candidate_summary: A Catalan-castell-inspired LLM architecture using a wide pinya broadcast layer, 9-head-per-layer tronc stack, 3-head pom top, and 2-phase synchronous-rise inference with drop-detection re-broadcast fallback.
content_words: pinya base ring K-head weight-distributing broadcast layer
catalan castell human tower pinya foundation
pom de dalt top 3 levels children
Toc de Castells music build signal 2-phase

results.name: LLM Inference Scheduling Survey Oct 2025
results.rationale: Generic tier scheduling and checkpoint propagation does not implement a pinya broadcast ring or 2-phase synchronous-rise build.

results.name: Rethinking LLM Inference Bottlenecks MLA+MoE
results.rationale: MLA+MoE bottleneck analysis is orthogonal to the castell-inspired phased broadcast and tier-gradient weighting.

results.name: Role of Attention Heads in LLM Safety
results.rationale: Head-level safety analysis touches collapse prevention conceptually but lacks the layer-0 broadcast ring and phased rise mechanism.

results.name: TransMLA Multi-head Latent Attention
results.rationale: Shared-latent KV compression is a different functional mechanism with no phased schedule or fallback re-broadcast.

results.name: HERMES Multi-Stage AI Inference Pipelines
results.rationale: Multi-stage pipeline staging differs from a 2-phase pinya-then-upper synchronous build with tier-gradient weighting.

results.name: MemOS Memory OS for AI Systems
results.rationale: 3-tier memory OS targets memory hierarchy, not attention-head ring broadcasting or phased inference.

results.name: Linear Predictability of Attention Heads
results.rationale: Asymmetric K/V predictability is a probing result, not a phased-build broadcast architecture.

results.name: Attention Consistency LLM Explanation EMNLP 2025
results.rationale: Per-layer consistency for explanation differs from drop-detection coherence-fallback re-broadcast of a pinya ring.

decision_rationale: No prior-art result reaches keyword, semantic, or functional thresholds, so the castell-inspired phased broadcast architecture appears sufficiently novel to PASS. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.76-0.86 / func 0.76-0.88 on hierarchical-tier-scheduling and collapse-prevention adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
